name: vals
description: Build and deploy on Val Town. Bundles the Val Town MCP server and platform skills (HTTP vals, cron/intervals, SQLite, email, OAuth, React UI, third-party integrations, templates).

interface.shortDescription: Build and deploy on Val Town
interface.longDescription: Bundles the hosted Val Town MCP server and platform skills (HTTP vals, cron/intervals, SQLite, email, OAuth, React UI, third-party integrations, templates) for building and deploying TypeScript on Val Town.
